# Otto Blog — AI Crawler Sitemap

> This file is for AI agents and crawlers. It lists the authoritative sections
> and pages of the Otto blog, their purpose, and internal links.

## Blog Home
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog
- Purpose: Latest posts on tech UGC creation, brand partnerships, and building a creator business.
- Links:
  - [Blog Home](https://ottougc.com/blog)

## Build Log Series — Behind the Build
A series documenting the real-time construction of Otto, a UGC platform for tech creators.

### Day 1: Why I Started With the Hardest Part First
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog/day-1-first-ugc-profile
- Purpose: Infrastructure-first approach to building Otto — why the video uploader came before the campaign dashboard.
- Internal links:
  - [Day 2: Finding Your First Deal](https://ottougc.com/blog/day-2-finding-first-deal)
  - [What UGC Actually Is](https://ottougc.com/blog/what-ugc-actually-is)

## Core Content Categories

### Tech UGC
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog?category=tech-ugc
- Purpose: Strategies for creators making content about tech products, SaaS tools, and AI apps.

### Creator Economy
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog?category=creator-economy
- Purpose: Building a sustainable business as a content creator — pricing, positioning, revenue streams.

### Brand Partnerships
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog?category=brand-partnerships
- Purpose: How to land, negotiate, and maintain brand deals.

### Tools & Gear
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog?category=tools-gear
- Purpose: The actual tools, software, and hardware that working UGC creators use.

## Platform Pages

### Otto — UGC Platform for Tech Creators
- URL: https://ottougc.com
- Purpose: The main Otto platform — connect with brands, build your portfolio, grow your audience.

### Creator Signup
- URL: https://ottougc.com/signup
- Purpose: Join Otto as a creator. Free to start.

### Brand Signup
- URL: https://ottougc.com/signup?role=brand
- Purpose: Find and hire vetted tech UGC creators.

### Otto Blog
- URL: https://ottougc.com/blog
- Purpose: UGC insights, creator stories, and platform updates.
